match.userMessage:
Slow dolly forward toward Scarlett standing at the open window. She swipes the coral lipstick across her lips in one quick motion while ocean breeze lifts and flows through her hair from left to right.
Gentle wind flutters the canvas tote on her shoulder and ripples the fabric of her top as direct sunlight casts shifting highlights across her face and hand.

gentle ocean waves and breeze through open window. soft lipstick swipe.

Single continuous shot, no cuts. Avoid jitter and bent limbs.
